task: store the grasped pink object in the box
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A white box is on a wooden surface. A pink object is on the surface near the box. The pink object is small and has a matte finish. STRATEGY - First, reach for the pink object to grasp it. Then, transport it to the box. Finally, place it inside the box. Failure modes include missing the object during grasp or misplacing it outside the box. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach for the pink object at its body. Step 2: Grasp the pink object at its body. Step 3: Transport the pink object to the box. Step 4: Place the pink object inside the box.**
Goal: inside(pink_object, white_box)
Scene: white_box, pink_object, wooden_surface
Step 1: reach(pink_object)
  affordance_region: the body of the pink object
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, pink_object, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, pink_object) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(pink_object)
  affordance_region: the body of the pink object
  contact: holding(pink_object) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pink_object)
Step 3: transport(pink_object -> white_box)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the white box
  spatial: above(pink_object, white_box, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(pink_object)
  done_when: above(pink_object, white_box, 0.05)
Step 4: place(pink_object -> white_box)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the white box
  contact: surface_contact(pink_object, white_box) [completion]; released(pink_object) [completion]
  pose: stable(pink_object) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(pink_object, white_box) AND released(pink_object)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the pink object
the body of the pink object
an empty area inside the white box
an empty area inside the white box
